Name: Copy File
Description: Copies a file from source to target path.

SettingsInputs.Name: Overwrite
SettingsInputs.Description: Allow overwriting existing target file (default true)

StateOutputs.Name: FileLocation
StateOutputs.Description: The target path the file was referenced at (may be relative)

StateOutputs.Name: FileName
StateOutputs.Description: The name of the target file only (no directory)

StateOutputs.Name: FilePath
StateOutputs.Description: The fully resolved absolute path of the target file

StateOutputs.Name: BytesCopied
StateOutputs.Description: Size of the copied file in bytes
